attributes.action: Open North Sea oil and gas production
attributes.additional_details: With all the tensions and troubles we should have our own gas and oil supply to protect the uk jobs and people
attributes.background: Remove all restrictions on oil production from the North Sea, stop all the red tape and let’s get back to being a productive country

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Reopen British oil and gas fields using taxpayer funds for UK use only" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/742116
